data.transcript:
WEBVTT


00:00:00.000 --> 00:00:03.180
Here's everything that happened in America in the last 12 hours.

00:00:03.181 --> 00:00:05.101
Trump issued a 48 hour ultimatum

00:00:05.102 --> 00:00:08.541
warning he will hit and obliterate Iran's largest power plants

00:00:08.542 --> 00:00:12.301
if Tehran does not fully reopen the Strait of Hormuz by Monday night.

00:00:12.302 --> 00:00:15.581
Iran fired two ballistic missiles at the joint U S U K.

00:00:15.582 --> 00:00:18.041
Diego Garcia base in the Indian Ocean,

00:00:18.042 --> 00:00:20.301
both of which missed, revealing missile capabilities

00:00:20.302 --> 00:00:22.861
far beyond what Tehran had previously claimed.

00:00:22.862 --> 00:00:26.501
Trump told ICC agents to get ready to take over airport security

00:00:26.502 --> 00:00:29.861
as soon as Monday if Democrats don't sign a DHS funding deal.

00:00:29.862 --> 00:00:33.261
As TSA lines stretched beyond two hours at major airports.

00:00:33.262 --> 00:00:36.621
Border Patrol agents arrested two Mexican fugitives in California,

00:00:36.622 --> 00:00:39.741
one wanted for homicide and another for lewd acts on a child,

00:00:39.742 --> 00:00:42.561
turning both over to Mexican authorities for prosecution.

00:00:42.562 --> 00:00:45.741
Florida New Hampshire wedding venue collapsed during a ceremony,

00:00:45.742 --> 00:00:48.061
sending nearly 70 guests into the basement,

00:00:48.062 --> 00:00:50.781
with six hospitalized and no fatalities reported.

00:00:50.782 --> 00:00:54.181
Hawaii is experiencing its worst flooding in 20 years,

00:00:54.182 --> 00:00:58.121
5,500 people evacuated from Oahu's North Shore,

00:00:58.180 --> 00:01:01.500
and a 120 year old dam at risk of imminent failure

00:01:01.501 --> 00:01:03.581
as heavy rain continues through the weekend.

00:01:03.582 --> 00:01:07.341
Robert Mueller, the decorated Vietnam veteran and 12 year FBI director

00:01:07.342 --> 00:01:09.141
who LED the Russia election probe,

00:01:09.142 --> 00:01:10.941
died Friday night in Charlottesville,

00:01:10.942 --> 00:01:14.381
Virginia at age 81 after battling Parkinson's disease.

00:01:14.382 --> 00:01:16.661
Trump responded to Muller's death on Truth Social,

00:01:16.662 --> 00:01:17.421
saying, good,

00:01:17.422 --> 00:01:20.141
I'm glad he's dead. He can no longer hurt innocent people,

00:01:20.142 --> 00:01:23.920
drawing widespread condemnation from Democrats and former colleagues.
